macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US GDP Growth Sharply Slows to 0.5% in Q4 2025 Amid Sticky Inflation
items.summary: US GDP growth dropped to 0.5% in Q4 2025, far below the advance estimate of 1.4% and down from 4.4% in Q3, with consumer spending showing fatigue and inflation remaining above the Fed's 2% target. Global PMI data indicates slowing output growth and surging input costs driven by energy prices.

items.title: March CPI Surges 0.9% MoM to 3.3% YoY on Energy Shock from Iran War
items.summary: Consumer Price Index rose 0.9% in March and 3.3% year-over-year, driven by a 10.9% energy index spike including 21.2% gasoline increase, with core inflation at 2.6% YoY. Analysts predict no Fed rate cuts until late 2026 unless labor market weakens.

items.title: Iran War Triggers Global Economic Crisis with Lasting Energy Price Impacts
items.summary: The ongoing war in Iran is causing enormous disruptions to the global economy beyond the US, with effects expected to persist long after the conflict ends, exacerbating inflation and growth slowdowns.

items.title: Upcoming US Economic Data Releases Highlight Manufacturing and Labor Indicators
items.summary: Key releases in the past 24 hours include Dallas Fed Manufacturing Index at -0.2, Chicago PMI at 52.8, and previews for ADP Employment, Retail Sales, ISM Manufacturing PMI, and final GDP figures. Fed Chair Powell speech scheduled amid stagflation concerns.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Elon Musk Claims xAI's Grok 5 Could Reach Artificial General Intelligence
items.summary: Elon Musk has publicly stated for the first time that xAI's Grok 5 has a real chance of reaching AGI. The model features 6 trillion parameters, a Mixture of Experts architecture, massive context window, and native multimodal processing across text, images, video, and audio, trained on the Colossus 2 supercomputer.
items.source: YouTube - Grok 5: The 6 Trillion Parameter AI That Could Change Everything

items.title: Noose Research and Xiaomi Partner to Offer Free MIMO V2 Pro Model
items.summary: Noose Research partnered with Xiaomi on April 7, 2026 to provide MIMO V2 Pro—a 1 trillion parameter model with 1M token context window—free inside Hermes Agent for 2 weeks. Hermes is an open-source, self-hosted AI agent with 40+ built-in skills and 200+ model support.
items.source: YouTube - Hermes + Xiaomi = FREE AI Agents!

items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Mythos Preview and Announces Safety-Held Model
items.summary: Anthropic has released a Claude Mythos Preview and announced an unreleased Mythos model that was held back for safety reasons. The company also resolved its dispute with the Pentagon and launched Claude's Microsoft 365 connector.
items.source: YouTube - Have you heard these exciting AI news? - April 10, 2026

items.title: Google Releases Open-Source Gemma 4 Model
items.summary: Google has released Gemma 4 as an open-source AI model, expanding its accessible AI offerings to developers and researchers.
items.source: YouTube - Have you heard these exciting AI news? - April 10, 2026

items.title: Meta Announces Muse Spark Model
items.summary: Meta has announced its Muse Spark model as part of recent AI model releases and developments in the industry.
items.source: YouTube - Have you heard these exciting AI news? - April 10, 2026

items.title: India Achieves 1000 Km Quantum Communication Breakthrough
items.summary: India has successfully demonstrated quantum communication over 1000 km under its National Quantum Mission. The government has also expanded support to 17 quantum startups to accelerate indigenous capabilities in quantum computing, communication, sensing, and materials.
items.source: YouTube - India Achieves 1000 Km Quantum Communication Milestone

items.title: Cursor 3.0 Major Update Released
items.summary: Cursor 3.0 has received a major update, enhancing its AI-powered code editor capabilities for developers.
items.source: YouTube - Have you heard these exciting AI news? - April 10, 2026

items.title: Alibaba Releases Wan 2.1 Open-Source AI Video Model
items.summary: Alibaba has released Wan 2.1, an open-source AI video generation model, expanding the availability of advanced video synthesis technology.
items.source: YouTube - Have you heard these exciting AI news? - April 10, 2026

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Rumored to Separate Digital and Physical Game Pricing
items.summary: Discussions highlight rumors of Nintendo implementing different pricing for digital and physical game copies, alongside mentions of a lost patent and negative reviews impacting the company.

items.title: Steam Rumored to Introduce FPS Calculator Tool
items.summary: Steam is reportedly developing an FPS calculator, with talks on hardware surveys showing trends in Intel usage, Mac gaming, and search interests.

items.title: Crazy Pokémon TCG Deals Spark Excitement and Debate
items.summary: Massive deals on Pokémon Trading Card Game products, including sets like Perfect Order and Phantasmal Flames, are crashing in price, with discussions on stock availability and botting.

items.title: Warzone Season 3 Major Update Introduces New Best TTK Meta Loadout
items.summary: A significant update in Warzone Season 3 has revealed a new top time-to-kill meta loadout, alongside surprise Call of Duty updates including new weapons and Modern Warfare news.

items.title: GTA Online Mansions Update Enables Insane Solo Money Farms
items.summary: The new Mansions DLC and weekly update in GTA Online provide the best solo money-making methods, allowing players to stack millions easily.
